verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of the sons of Korah, set to Alamoth. A Song. God is our refuge and strength, A very ready help in trouble.
verses.2: Therefore we will not fear, though the earth shakes And the mountains slip into the heart of the sea;
verses.3: Though its waters roar and foam, Though the mountains quake at its swelling pride. Selah
verses.4: There is a river whose streams make the city of God happy, The holy dwelling places of the Most High.
verses.5: God is in the midst of her, she will not be moved; God will help her when morning dawns.
verses.6: The nations made an uproar, the kingdoms tottered; He raised His voice, the earth quaked.
verses.7: The LORD of armies is with us; The God of Jacob is our stronghold. Selah
verses.8: Come, behold the works of the LORD, Who has inflicted horrific events on the earth.
verses.9: He makes wars to cease to the end of the earth; He breaks the bow and cuts the spear in two; He burns the chariots with fire.
verses.10: “Stop striving and know that I am God; I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted on the earth.”
verses.11: The LORD of armies is with us; The God of Jacob is our stronghold. Selah
